name: 1q21_2_intermediate_block
description: 1q21.2 SD-rich block immediately distal to 1q21.1 proximal CNV region. Continues the 1q21 SD landscape with PDE4DIP, NOTCH2NLR, NBPF-paralog copies and contributes to atypical, larger 1q21 deletions/duplications spanning beyond the canonical BP3-BP4 boundaries.

architecture.internal_structure: Continuation of 1q21 SD landscape; PDE4DIP, NBPF/NOTCH2NL paralogs in tandem clusters; high SD density (>50% of bases in SD).
